title: Hallmark Gift Bags, Pack of 3 Large Gift Bags, 3 Festive Santa & Reindeer Designs, Christmas
features: CHRISTMAS GIFT BAG: This fun and colourful pack of Christmas gift bags from Hallmark is large enough to hold a variety of surprises and presents. They're perfect for those larger gifts that are difficult to wrap, and will look amazing under the tree!

CHRISTMAS GIFT BAGS PACK: This Hallmark pack of 3 large gift bags is the perfect way to celebrate Christmas. Each bag features red knitted handles, have a festive pattern and illustration on them and are accompanied with a blank, circular gift tag.
HIGH-QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: This product is made using material from well-managed, FSC-certified forests and other controlled sources.
RECYCLABILITY: To recycle these bags, remove the handles and tags and recycle with card and paper materials, ensure non-paper material is disposed of separately.

GIFT BAG SIZE: These large gift bags measure 33cm by 26.5cm by 14.6cm, and each gift tag measure 7.8cm by 7.8cm. The generous size of the bags ensures that your gifts will fit snugly inside, while the sturdy handles make it easy to carry.
